identity.name: AthlyticAI
identity.tagline: Train smarter. Buy right. Play better.
identity.description: An AI-powered badminton companion that feels like a mix of Strava's analytics, Duolingo's progress tracking, and Nike Training Club's premium aesthetic. Dark mode first, high contrast, neon accents.

buttons.primary: bg-lime-400 text-black hover:bg-lime-500 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(190,242,100,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full border border-white/10
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-lime-400 hover:bg-lime-400/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg

cards.base: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-lime-400/50 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer
cards.stat: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 p-4 rounded-lg flex flex-col justify-between h-full

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-lime-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-lime-400 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 w-full transition-all

structure: Hero Section (Full height, dark moody image, neon text)

auth.structure: Split screen. Left: Motivational Image. Right: Minimalist OTP Form.

equipment.card_style: Horizontal card. Left: Product Image. Center: Specs (Bars). Right: Match Score (Circle).

universal_guidelines: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that athletic, compressed feel.
Always use the 'Volt Green' (#bef264) for primary actions. It is the 'Go' signal.
Dark mode is mandatory. Do not create a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked later.
Use Lucide icons with stroke-width={1.5} for a premium, thin look.
All cards must have a subtle 1px border (border-zinc-800) to define edges in dark mode.
Charts should use the neon palette: #bef264 (Lime), #38bdf8 (Sky), #a855f7 (Purple).
For interactive elements, always add 'cursor-pointer' and a hover state (brightness-110 or scale-105).
Ensure all images have 'object-cover' and 'rounded-xl' unless they are full-screen backgrounds.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Never use generic HTML dropdowns. Use Shadcn Select.
Never use generic HTML date pickers. Use Shadcn Calendar.
